title: VJ'S SKIES
description: New vibrant colors and fog for the skies in diferent biomes :D
body: This resourcepack adds a lot new sky colors and custom fog for each biome, giving an incredible experience for Minecraft. Works with [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone). You can play with it in vanilla minecraft, but i recommend play it with [VJ's STYLE](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vjs-style)
